abstract: We construct an emulator for the halo mass function over group and cluster mass scales for a range of cosmologies, including the effects of dynamical dark energy and massive neutrinos. title: The Mira-Titan Universe II: Matter Power Spectrum Emulation
abstract: We introduce a new cosmic emulator for the matter power spectrum covering eight cosmological parameters.
